title: Beef Tacos with Thai Twist
description: A fusion of Mexican and Thai flavors in a simple ground beef taco recipe.
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the taco seasoning and cook according to the packet instructions.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened.
Add the chopped cilantro, Thai red chili flakes, and cumin. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the creamy salsa and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the beef mixture in tacos with your favorite toppings.
Cook the tacos in a 350°F oven for 5-7 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
